# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions are supported. Please be sure to play with one of these versions.<br>
Please note that the internal processing for "Supabase mode" is currently incomplete.
| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 5.0.0 | :white_check_mark: |
| 4.7.0 | :x: |
| 4.0.0 | :x: |
| Supabase mode | :white_check_mark: |

<!-- ## Reporting a Vulnerability -->
